# Project Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by /ccfold. Manual edits are preserved on re-fold. -->

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** gh
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/claudecode-workflow.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** main
- **Merge strategy:** squash

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** GitHub native (Open/Closed)
- **Agent instruction:** Use `gh issue edit` to transition status. No status labels — use platform native state.

## Existing Labels

<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict -->

### Default GitHub Labels
- `bug` — Something isn't working
- `documentation` — Improvements or additions to documentation
- `duplicate` — This issue or pull request already exists
- `enhancement` — New feature or request
- `good first issue` — Good for newcomers
- `help wanted` — Extra attention is needed
- `invalid` — This doesn't seem right
- `question` — Further information is requested
- `wontfix` — This will not be worked on

### type:: Labels
- `type::bug` — Defect
- `type::feature` — New functionality
- `type::chore` — Maintenance, refactoring, dependency updates
- `type::docs` — Documentation-only changes
- `type::epic` — Parent issue tracking a body of work

### priority:: Labels
- `priority::critical` — Drop everything
- `priority::high` — Must do this iteration
- `priority::medium` — Should do soon
- `priority::low` — Backlog

### urgency:: Labels
- `urgency::immediate` — Time-critical now
- `urgency::soon` — Near-term deadline
- `urgency::normal` — No special time pressure
- `urgency::eventual` — No deadline

### size:: Labels
- `size::S` — Few lines, one file
- `size::M` — Multiple files, few hours
- `size::L` — Multiple components, roughly a day
- `size::XL` — Multi-day, likely needs decomposition

### severity:: Labels
- `severity::critical` — System down, data corruption, security
- `severity::major` — Core broken, no workaround
- `severity::minor` — Impaired but workaround exists
- `severity::cosmetic` — Visual or UX annoyance

## Toolchain
- **Validation:** `./scripts/ci/validate.sh`
- **Tests:** `python3 -m pytest tests/`
- **Build:** `./scripts/ci/build.sh`
- **Lint:** shellcheck, shfmt, py_compile (via validate.sh)

## CI
- **System:** GitHub Actions + GitLab CI (dual)
- **Config:** `.github/workflows/validate.yml`, `.gitlab-ci.yml`
